_meta.eval: fineweb val CE, n=50 batches, ctx2048, batch4, seed0
_meta.method: forward-hook zeroes GDN sublayer output (residual passes through)
_meta.conclusion: GDN-2 layers are load-bearing: zeroing all 3 raises CE +1.36 nats (3.98->5.34). Refutes the hypothesis that GDN layers were under-trained/inactive due to 0.1x LR. Verified separately that C's main-path GDN layers train at full 4e-4/wd0.1 AdamW (0.1x mult applies only to gist gate, absent in C). Early layer 1 matters most (+0.60) > layer 3 (+0.42) > layer 5 (+0.20).
